affected_pattern: Batch of customer records with missing TotalCharges during peak traffic period
root_cause: Data pipeline overflow during peak traffic — billing processing pipeline buffers overflowed during peak hours, causing billing records to be dropped and resulting in NULL billing fields.
supporting_evidence: Billing Record Failure RCA Playbook: Data Pipeline Overflow pattern
Failures correlate with peak traffic hours (18:00-22:00)
Pipeline throughput metrics show capacity exceeded 120%
recommended_action: Scale mediation infrastructure for peak traffic
Replay lost billing records from network element raw files
